meta.title: How the F-22 changed fighters FOREVER (with help from real Raptor pilots)
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –
Last month, I traveled out to Oahu, Hawaii, where I had the opportunity to hang out with some of the incredible Air Force and Air National Guard pilots tasked with flying the most advanced and capable air superiority fighter on the planet, the F-22 Raptor. 

I'd like to send my most sincere thanks out to LtCol Paul "Loco" Lopez, Captain Wendell "BATR" Upp, Lt Casey Sturdivan, Lt. Maggie Blice, Chief Chris McCool, and everyone else from the 15th Wing Public Affairs office and the Total Force Integration unit comprised of the 199th Fighter Squadron and 19th Fighter Squadron out of Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam for making this video possible!

Check out the 15th Wing Public Affrairs on Facebook and Instagram here:
https://www.facebook.com/15thWing/
https://www.instagram.com/15thwing/
